properties.name: hobbit.jackson.big-num-to-string
properties.description: 响应到前端，大数值自动写出为 String，避免精度丢失

properties.name: hobbit.jackson.null-to-empty
properties.description: null 转为 空，字符串转成""，数组转为[]，对象转为{}，数字转为-1

properties.name: hobbit.jackson.support-text-plain
properties.description: 支持 MediaType text/plain，用于和 hobbit-api-crypto 一起使用
